macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Iran War, Brent Hits $110
items.summary: Oil markets are in turmoil due to the Iran conflict, with Brent crude rising to around $110 per barrel and U.S. gasoline prices up $1 per gallon. OPEC+ warns of prolonged supply disruptions even after the war ends, pushing prompt spreads into deep backwardation.[2][3]

items.title: U.S. Inflation Expectations Spike to 5% on Energy Shock
items.summary: Short-term inflation expectations have jumped to 5% following the Iran war, with economists forecasting a 1% CPI rise in March—the sharpest since 2022—driven by higher gasoline prices. Fed minutes and upcoming data will be scrutinized amid risks of delayed rate cuts or hikes.[1][2][4]

items.title: US Dollar Strengthens Toward 100 Amid Global Stress
items.summary: The US dollar remains robust despite tensions, bolstered by strong March jobs data (178k added, 4.3% unemployment) and rising oil-driven inflation risks, reshaping Fed rate cut expectations. Weak euro and yen further support dollar dominance.[3]

items.title: Mortgage Rates Hit 6.4%, Highest Since September
items.summary: War-induced inflationary pressures have reversed housing market gains, pushing mortgage rates back to 6.4% from below 6%, delaying the spring buying season. Affordability crisis worsens with diesel and energy cost spikes rippling through economy.[6]

items.title: Stocks Mixed; Dow Up 1,000 Points on Trump Iran Comments
items.summary: U.S. stocks closed mixed after Trump vowed to hit Iran 'extremely hard' while signaling possible off-ramps; earlier Dow surged 1,000 points. Oil soared over 10%, with Alcoa +22%, Nike -14% amid broader market volatility.[1][5]

items.title: Upcoming U.S. Inflation Data and Fed Minutes in Focus
items.summary: March CPI and PPI data, due this week, expected at 1.3% YoY and 0.5% respectively, will highlight energy cost impacts from Middle East war. South Korea's central bank likely to hold rates at 2.50% amid uncertainties.[1]

items.title: Amazon Imposes 3.5% Surcharge on Sellers Due to Fuel Costs
items.summary: Amazon will add a 3.5% surcharge on third-party sellers as war-driven fuel prices rise. Other corporate impacts include Tesla sales rising post-boycotts but missing targets.[5]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Near $70K Amid US-Iran Ceasefire Talks, Liquidates $270M in Shorts
items.summary: Bitcoin traded around $69,000-$70,000, up over 3-4% in the past 24 hours, driven by US-Iran ceasefire reports, with $146M-$270M in short positions liquidated. Cardano and Ethereum outperformed Bitcoin, while crypto market cap recovered to $2.38 trillion.

items.title: Bitcoin Rises Above $70K Despite Trump Iran War Threats
items.summary: Bitcoin jumped back above $70,000 and Ether rose up to 3.7% as investors weighed Iran ceasefire reports amid Trump's threats on Iranian infrastructure. The cryptocurrency traded around $69,200 in early Asia session.

items.title: MARA Holdings Cuts 15% Workforce to Pivot to AI, Stock Gains 8%
items.summary: MARA Holdings reduced its workforce by 15% to shift from Bitcoin mining to AI, with shares rising over 8% on Friday and up 3% pre-market Monday. Riot Platforms reported Q1 production of 1,473 BTC amid rising Bitcoin mining stocks.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits $69,959 on Binance, Up 4.39% in 24 Hours
items.summary: Bitcoin fluctuated between $66,681 and $70,283 over the past 24 hours, trading at $69,959 as of 09:30 UTC, marking a 4.39% gain. The surge liquidated $196M in shorts according to market data.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Recovers to $2.38 Trillion, Bitcoin and Ethereum Consolidate
items.summary: The total crypto market capitalization rose 2.5% to $2.38 trillion in the past 24 hours, with Bitcoin and Ethereum in prolonged consolidation. High-volume assets like Solana traded at $79.60, down 1.64%.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: University of Chicago Receives $50M Gift to Hire AI Expert Faculty
items.summary: The University of Chicago has received a $50 million gift to recruit faculty at the forefront of AI across disciplines like arts, social sciences, medicine, business, and law. The funds launch the Mansueto Faculty of Mind and Machine Challenge to raise nearly $200 million for 20 scholars and AI research.

items.title: AI and Job Loss: Millions Face 'Professional Identity Purgatory'
items.summary: AI is poised to displace millions into professional identity crises beyond just job loss, affecting judgment, relationships, and context that machines can't replicate. The article draws from personal experience of a 30-year career ending due to acquisition and AI impacts.

items.title: Five Concerns About AI Data Centers and Policy Solutions
items.summary: A report outlines concerns like AI workloads threatening grid reliability with volatile power profiles and straining water resources, recommending AI and machine learning tools for better interconnection queue management. It references studies on GPU power during GPT-2 training and Llama 3.1 inference.

items.title: From Automation to Autonomy: Next Generation of AI Agents
items.summary: AI agents are evolving from automation to autonomy through machine learning and generative AI, enabling continuous improvement and transformative capabilities.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Street Fighter 6 Introduces Controversial Character Ingrid, Sparking Speculation on Major Changes
items.summary: Ingrid, a space god character from a cancelled Capcom project, joins Street Fighter 6, potentially opening doors to new mechanics, guest characters, and collaborations like Capcom vs SNK 3.

items.title: Star Citizen Nears Major Milestone After 14 Years in Development
items.summary: Star Citizen creator Chris Roberts discusses the project's ambition, community, billion-dollar funding, and upcoming single-player campaign Squadron 42 featuring stars like Mark Hamill and Henry Cavill.

items.title: Evercade Announces Nexus 64 Themed Version and Multiplayer Features
items.summary: Evercade Nexus reveals an N64-colored themed edition and new multiplayer options allowing one cartridge across multiple systems without internet.

items.title: RAID Shadow Legends Adds New Token Trader Champions Gentoro and Suzarin Katon
items.summary: The game introduces Gentoro and Suzarin Katon as new token trader champions, prompting discussions on their value and potential internal development mandates.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Janus International Group Launches Nokē Infinitē Dual Technology Smart Lock
items.summary: Janus International Group announced Nokē Infinitē, an on-door, dual technology smart locking system combining Bluetooth and power harvesting for self-storage and industrial applications. This addition enhances their Nokē Smart Entry product line.

items.title: Metazoa Updates Snapshot with AI Assistant for Salesforce
items.summary: Metazoa introduced updates to its Snapshot tool on Salesforce AppExchange, featuring an AI assistant that analyzes metadata to manage complexity, reduce risk, and improve org health.

items.title: Ridge AI Emerges from Stealth with $2.6M Pre-Seed Funding
items.summary: Ridge AI launched from stealth with $2.6M pre-seed funding led by Madrona, offering AI-native analytics for B2B software companies to build interactive dashboards and data agents quickly.

items.title: Siemens Hosts Transform Innovation Day 2026
items.summary: Siemens held its Transform Innovation Day 2026 event, gathering industry leaders to discuss how digital technologies are reshaping manufacturing, infrastructure, and future innovations.
